title: polystichum crinulosum
intro: Polystichum crinulosum, also known as the Lady fern or Chinese Lady fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Polystichum crinulosum include its ability to cool the body, clear heat, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for fever and various skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and heart disease. Polystichum crinulosum is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
